implementation_summary: Added an actor proof-factory substrate that records explicit per-actor proof levels, failure classes, durable proof rows, proof summary/list/detail APIs, run-to-proof promotion, a resumable proof runner script, visible proof counters/status in the existing UI, and focused tests that prevent API-mapped actors from being claimed as live E2E proven. Added fixes preventing failed actor runs from being promoted to ui_route_passed, preventing zero-item completed runs from being promoted to runtime_smoke_passed, preventing the proof runner from asserting UI proof by default, routing generated test inputs to hosted first-party fixtures, and fixing the runtime family classifier so the word leading no longer triggers lead-generation routing.
